requirement_topic.en: BESS Fire Safety Installation — Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate Approval and Applicable Fire Code Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: BESS消防安全安装——伊拉克民防总局审批及适用消防规范要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS消防安全安裝——伊拉克民防總局審批及適用消防規範要求

summary.en: The Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate (CDD), operating under the Ministry of Interior, is the authority having jurisdiction for fire safety approvals in Iraq. BESS installations at commercial, industrial, and utility-scale power projects in Iraq require Civil Defence Directorate approval of the fire-safety design before commissioning. Iraq does not maintain a published list of formally adopted fire codes equivalent to NFPA's comprehensive system; the Civil Defence Directorate reviews fire-safety designs on a project-specific basis. NFPA 855 (Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems) is the internationally dominant BESS fire-installation standard and is expected to be referenced in project specifications by international developers (TotalEnergies, PowerChina, Masdar) active in Iraq's solar tender pipeline. IEC 62933-5-2 (Safety Requirements for electrochemical-based systems) is also expected in project lender requirements. Formal Civil Defence Directorate adoption of NFPA 855 specifically for stationary BESS has not been confirmed from publicly accessible official sources as of the dataset date; this requires direct verification with the Directorate before project design is finalised. BESS project teams should engage a locally licensed fire protection engineer for design review and authority liaison.
summary.zh: 伊拉克民防总局（CDD）隶属于内政部，是伊拉克消防安全审批的主管机关。伊拉克商业、工业及公用事业规模电力项目中的BESS装置，须在调试前取得民防总局对消防安全设计的审批。伊拉克未发布与NFPA综合体系相当的正式采纳消防规范清单；民防总局以项目专属方式审查消防安全设计。NFPA 855（固定式储能系统安装标准）是国际上占主导地位的BESS消防安装标准，在伊拉克太阳能招标管线中活跃的国际开发商（道达尔能源、PowerChina、Masdar）的项目规格中预计会予以引用。项目贷款方要求中亦预计会引用IEC 62933-5-2（电化学系统安全要求）。截至本数据集日期，民防总局专门针对固定式BESS正式采纳NFPA 855尚未从可公开获取的官方来源得到确认；在项目设计最终确定前须直接向总局核实。BESS项目团队应聘请持当地执照的消防工程师进行设计审查和主管机关联络。
summary.zht: 伊拉克民防總局（CDD）隸屬於內政部，是伊拉克消防安全審批的主管機關。伊拉克商業、工業及公用事業規模電力項目中的BESS裝置，須在調試前取得民防總局對消防安全設計的審批。伊拉克未發布與NFPA綜合體系相當的正式採納消防規範清單；民防總局以項目專屬方式審查消防安全設計。NFPA 855（固定式儲能系統安裝標準）是國際上佔主導地位的BESS消防安裝標準，在伊拉克太陽能招標管線中活躍的國際開發商（道達爾能源、PowerChina、Masdar）的項目規格中預計會予以引用。項目貸款方要求中亦預計會引用IEC 62933-5-2（電化學系統安全要求）。截至本數據集日期，民防總局專門針對固定式BESS正式採納NFPA 855尚未從可公開獲取的官方來源得到確認；在項目設計最終確定前須直接向總局核實。BESS項目團隊應聘請持當地執照的消防工程師進行設計審查和主管機關聯絡。

standards_or_laws: Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate (CDD) — fire-safety approval authority for commercial, industrial, and power project installations in Iraq; operates under Ministry of Interior

NFPA 855 — Standard for the Installation of Stationary Energy Storage Systems (internationally dominant BESS fire-installation standard; formal CDD adoption for stationary BESS unconfirmed as of dataset date — verify directly with Civil Defence Directorate)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected in project-lender specifications for Iraq BESS projects)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)

summary.en: China manages BESS fire safety under a combination of mandatory standards and project-level fire-safety review. GB 44240-2024 includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells and modules. GB/T 36276-2023 and GB/T 36558-2023 cover system-level safety including fire-related requirements. Project-level fire-safety review in China is governed by local fire authority approval procedures. These Chinese fire-safety standards and domestic approval procedures are not recognised by the Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate as equivalent to Iraq's project-specific fire-safety installation requirements or to international NFPA/IEC frameworks referenced by project lenders. BESS fire-safety evidence prepared under Chinese standards must be supplemented with internationally recognised fire-safety design documentation for Civil Defence Directorate project review in Iraq.
summary.zh: 中国通过强制性标准和项目级消防审查相结合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS电芯和模组的消防安全规定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆盖包括消防相关要求在内的系统级安全。中国的项目级消防审查由地方消防主管机关审批程序管控。上述中国消防安全标准和国内审批程序不被伊拉克民防总局认可为等同于伊拉克项目专属消防安全安装要求或项目贷款方引用的国际NFPA/IEC框架。依据中国标准准备的BESS消防安全证据，须在伊拉克民防总局项目审查中补充国际认可的消防安全设计文件。
summary.zht: 中國通過強制性標準和項目級消防審查相結合的方式管理BESS消防安全。GB 44240-2024包含BESS電芯和模組的消防安全規定。GB/T 36276-2023和GB/T 36558-2023覆蓋包括消防相關要求在內的系統級安全。中國的項目級消防審查由地方消防主管機關審批程序管控。上述中國消防安全標準和國內審批程序不被伊拉克民防總局認可為等同於伊拉克項目專屬消防安全安裝要求或項目貸款方引用的國際NFPA/IEC框架。依據中國標準準備的BESS消防安全證據，須在伊拉克民防總局項目審查中補充國際認可的消防安全設計文件。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (includes fire-safety provisions for BESS cells/modules; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)

gap.en: Gap: Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate fire-safety approval is a mandatory installation gate for BESS projects in Iraq. Chinese BESS fire-safety documentation based on GB standards does not satisfy the Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate's project-specific fire-safety requirements or the NFPA/IEC frameworks expected by international project lenders. Exporters and project teams should: (a) engage the Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate directly to confirm applicable fire codes for BESS installations and any project-specific derogations; (b) prepare BESS fire-safety design documentation aligned with NFPA 855 — including thermal-runaway propagation mitigation, gas detection or ventilation design, suppression system design, emergency shutdown procedures, and separation distances — as this is the internationally expected framework for project-lender review; (c) prepare IEC 62933-5-2 system-level safety evidence where project lenders require it; (d) engage a locally licensed fire protection engineer familiar with Civil Defence Directorate procedures for design review and application submission before project commissioning.
gap.zh: 差距：伊拉克民防总局消防安全审批是伊拉克BESS项目的强制安装门槛。依据GB标准编制的中国BESS消防安全文件不满足伊拉克民防总局的项目专属消防安全要求或国际项目贷款方预期的NFPA/IEC框架。出口商和项目团队应：（a）直接与伊拉克民防总局接触，确认BESS安装的适用消防规范及任何项目专属豁免；（b）准备符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全设计文件——包括热失控蔓延缓解、气体探测或通风设计、抑制系统设计、紧急停机程序及隔离距离——因为这是项目贷款方审查的国际预期框架；（c）在项目贷款方要求时准备IEC 62933-5-2系统级安全证据；（d）在项目调试前聘请熟悉民防总局程序的持当地执照消防工程师进行设计审查和申请提交。
gap.zht: 差距：伊拉克民防總局消防安全審批是伊拉克BESS項目的強制安裝門檻。依據GB標準編制的中國BESS消防安全文件不滿足伊拉克民防總局的項目專屬消防安全要求或國際項目貸款方預期的NFPA/IEC框架。出口商和項目團隊應：（a）直接與伊拉克民防總局接觸，確認BESS安裝的適用消防規範及任何項目專屬豁免；（b）準備符合NFPA 855要求的BESS消防安全設計文件——包括熱失控蔓延緩解、氣體探測或通風設計、抑制系統設計、緊急停機程序及隔離距離——因為這是項目貸款方審查的國際預期框架；（c）在項目貸款方要求時準備IEC 62933-5-2系統級安全證據；（d）在項目調試前聘請熟悉民防總局程序的持當地執照消防工程師進行設計審查和申請提交。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate approval required for BESS installations at commercial, industrial, and power project facilities; applicable fire code for BESS specifically has not been confirmed from official sources as of dataset date — verify directly with Civil Defence Directorate
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on Chinese project approval, installation type, and local fire authority requirements

source.publisher: Iraq Ministry of Interior (parent authority of the Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Iraqi Civil Defence Directorate fire-safety approval is a mandatory installation gate for commercial, industrial, and power project BESS in Iraq. Chinese GB-standard fire-safety documentation does not satisfy Iraq's project-specific fire-safety requirements or the NFPA/IEC frameworks expected by international project lenders active in Iraq's solar tender pipeline. Engage the Civil Defence Directorate and a locally licensed fire protection engineer at the earliest project stage to confirm applicable fire codes and design requirements before committing to system layout or equipment specification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 伊拉克民防总局消防安全审批是伊拉克商业、工业及电力项目BESS装置的强制安装门槛。中国GB标准消防安全文件不满足伊拉克项目专属消防安全要求或在伊拉克太阳能招标管线中活跃的国际项目贷款方预期的NFPA/IEC框架。在确定系统布局或设备规格前，应在项目最早阶段与民防总局及持当地执照消防工程师接触，确认适用消防规范及设计要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 伊拉克民防總局消防安全審批是伊拉克商業、工業及電力項目BESS裝置的強制安裝門檻。中國GB標準消防安全文件不滿足伊拉克項目專屬消防安全要求或在伊拉克太陽能招標管線中活躍的國際項目貸款方預期的NFPA/IEC框架。在確定系統布局或設備規格前，應在項目最早階段與民防總局及持當地執照消防工程師接觸，確認適用消防規範及設計要求。
